options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --label
options.description: The new label, or leave blank to promote to a full release.

options.name: --source
options.description: Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.

options.name: --destination
options.description: Package destination (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to source.

options.name: --api-key
options.description: The API key for the server.

options.name: --recurse
options.description: Whether to recursively promote dependencies

commands.name: source
commands.description: Releases the specified name and version

options.name: --version
options.description: The package version to promote. Leave blank to promote the latest pre-release version
